chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Civil Revision Appln. No. S- 09 of 2009 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing /priority 1.For Orders of C.M.A No.27 /2017 2.For Orders of C. M.A No.440 /2016 3.For Hearing of C. M.A No.89 /2016 4.For Hearing of C.M.A No.246 /2015 5.For Hearing of C.M.A No.132 /2015 6.For Hearing of C.M.A No.63 /2015 7.For Hearing of C.M.A No.156 /2012 8.For Hearing of C.M.A No.42 /2010 9.For Hearing of C.M.A No.67/2010 10.For Hearing of C.M.A No.190 /2010 11.For Hearing of main case. 03.12.2018 Mr. Imtiaz Ahmed Bhatti, Advocate/Petitioner in person. Mr. Ameer Ahmed Narejo, State counsel. -------- At the very outset it is stated by petitioner that he would not press disposal of instant Revision Application on merits if the learned trial Court is directed to implement its final order expeditiously in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Judge Abid H. Mr. Ameer Ahmed Narejo, State counsel. -------- At the very outset it is stated by appellant that he would not press disposal of instant Civil Guardian Appeal on merits if the learned trial Court is directed to implement its final order expeditiously in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Judge Abid H. Qazi/**.
